markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content audit findings and align on a refresh strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Prune the Blog:** Delete/redirect \~10-year-old, low-performing content to improve overall site authority and help new content rank.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [**Refresh Strategically:** Prioritize refreshing recent (post-2021) articles with high traffic loss or bottom-of-funnel intent. Preserve expert-authored content by adding comprehensiveness, not replacing it.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Adapt for LLMs:** Structure all content for AI visibility by using clear H2s, immediate answers, TLDRs, and FAQ schema.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [**Review Calibration:** The "What is an AI agent?" refresh is ready for review to validate the new, more conversational voice and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)

## Topics

### Content Audit Findings

  - [GrowthX delivered blog and glossary audits using GSC & GA4 data (engagement, bounce rate, publish date).](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [**Primary Issue:** The blog contains content from 2013-2014.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This outdated, low-performing content signals irrelevance to Google, hindering new content from ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Audit Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**P1 (Delete/Redirect):** Old, low-performing URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
      - [**P2 (Refresh/Redirect):** Old (pre-2021), low-performing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
      - [**P3 (Refresh):** Recent (post-2021) articles needing updates.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
      - [**P4 (Monitor):** High-performing or new content.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)

### Content Strategy & Workflow

  - [**Pruning Process:** GrowthX will manually review the P1 list to ensure no valuable, expert-authored content is removed.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Preserves topical authority, a key ranking factor.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [**Refresh Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [Prioritize articles with high traffic loss or bottom-of-funnel intent.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
      - [Integrate refresh tasks into the Airtable content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [**Future Workflow:** Automate content review triggers based on age (e.g., \>9 months) or performance thresholds.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)

### Authority & LLM Visibility

  - [**Maintaining Authority:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [**Problem:** New content may lack the authority of pieces written by Redis technical experts.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [**Solution:** Use Redis technical marketers as bylined authors for GrowthX-written content, a practice already in use.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**Optimizing for LLMs:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [**Rationale:** LLMs prefer recent content (6-8 months old).](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
      - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
          - [Structure with clear H2s and immediate answers.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
          - [Add TLDRs/key takeaways.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
          - [Implement FAQ schema.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
          - [Ensure server-side rendering (already in place).](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)

### Calibration Blog Review

  - [GrowthX refreshed the "What is an AI agent?" blog post to demonstrate the new voice and tone.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [**Feedback:** The draft is more conversational and less "AI-sounding" than previous examples.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
  - [**Process Clarification:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
      - [Feedback on writing guidelines is implemented manually by a human editor.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
      - [The AI generation pipeline uses a multi-step process: draft → validate against guidelines → fix non-compliant paragraphs.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Redis Team:** Review the "What is an AI agent?" calibration blog for voice, tone, and comprehensiveness.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
      - [Manually review the P1 audit list to confirm pruning suitability.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
      - [Record a walkthrough of the article generation pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/-ZVAKsrrWjUX76qKMp_v6jZcWCzshS3Q?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
